acceptance_criteria.text: Superadmin web API exists for industry pattern management.
proof: Added admin_industry_patterns_api blueprint and registered it in main.py.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web admin can accept/reject/revise pending proposals.
Web admin can regenerate proposals on revision.
proof: Revision tab exposes regenerate action and backend endpoint.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web admin can view active details, examples, decisions, health, and rollback candidates.
Web admin can create new pending version proposal, send active to revision, and disable active.
proof: Active version actions call new-proposal, revision, and disable endpoints.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web rollback uses preview, reason, confirm, and backend re-validation.
proof: RollbackPanel uses rollback-preview before rollback confirmation; backend re-runs preview validation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Bazich admin has a visible Patterns tab.
proof: AdminPage adds patterns tab and lazy-loads IndustryPatternsManagement.
No Alembic file was added for this stage.

acceptance_criteria.text: Local build/tests and production smoke checks pass.
proof: py_compile, pytest, build:all, dist integrity, production API/frontend/log smoke passed.
gaps: Full tsc has pre-existing unrelated failures.

known_gaps: Full frontend tsc has pre-existing unrelated failures outside this stage.
No browser screenshot because the admin UI requires a live superadmin session.
